title: Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Full Stack Developer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
